debug_info.goal:
m R : NNReal
hr : R ≠ 0
⊢ inertiaTensor (RigidBody.solidSphere 3 m R) = (2 / 5 * ↑m * ↑R ^ 2) • 1

failed_attempts:
ext i j
  simp only [inertiaTensor, solidSphere, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul, Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.one_apply, Pi.smul_apply,
    RingHom.id_apply, mul_eq_zero, inv_eq_zero, div_eq_zero_iff, coe_eq_zero]
  rw [integral_const_mul]
  swap; · exact IntegrableOn.integrable (ContinuousOn.integrableOn_compact (isCompact_closedBall 0 R) (by fun_prop))
  by_cases h : i = j
  · subst h
    simp only [if_true, sub_zero, mul_one]
    rw [integral_sub (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    rw [Space.integral_closedBall_norm_sq, Space.integral_closedBall_coord_sq]
    have hvol : (@volume (Space 3) measureSpaceOfInnerProductSpace).real (Metric.closedBall 0 R) ≠ 0 := by
      refine (measureReal_ne_zero_iff (Space.volume_closedBall_neq_top R)).mpr ?_
      apply Space.volume_closedBall_neq_zero
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne R.2 (Ne.symm (by simpa using hr))
    field_simp
    ring
  · simp only [h, if_false, mul_zero, sub_zero]
    rw [Space.integral_closedBall_coord_mul_coord_of_ne h]
    simp
